problem_statement:
Given an integer array 芒聙聵A芒聙聶 of size 芒聙聵N芒聙聶 and an integer 芒聙聵K'. Split the array 芒聙聵A芒聙聶 into 芒聙聵K芒聙聶 non-empty subarrays such that the largest sum of any subarray is minimized. Your task is to return the minimized largest sum of the split.
A subarray is a contiguous part of the array.
